strengths: Proficient SQL and Python for ETL/automation
Demonstrated data quality and governance work
Quantified impact on reporting and revenue
weaknesses: No explicit client profile merge/reassignment examples
improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies. Ensured local client data governance adherence in partnership with the Data Solutions team.

Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. Assisted on all database and client data related projects; acted as a subject expert on tools such as Salesforce, SAP, Power BI, Looker and other platforms.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), eliminating repetitive data entry, saving 8 hours per week, and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions. Responsible for data quality and cleansing updates, including client profile merges and client reassignment.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend. Supported analytics and insights surrounding the client database and all client channels, with an emphasis on identifying and understanding client behavior patterns.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Client Data & Insights Analyst opportunity with Cartier. I am interested in this opportunity because I am deeply impressed by Cartier's commitment to exceptional client experiences and its strategic use of data to enhance customer loyalty and acquisition. What interests me about working for Cartier is its esteemed reputation in the luxury market and its forward-thinking approach to leveraging data for business growth. This excites and intrigues me because it aligns perfectly with my passion for transforming raw data into actionable business strategies.

I believe my proficiency in data analysis and reporting tools, coupled with my strong communication skills, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on driving efficiency and delivering quantifiable results. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This resulted in a significant improvement in reporting accuracy and allowed for faster strategic decisions.

Ultimately, I know that the Client Data & Insights Analyst role at Cartier would allow me to bring my data visualization and reporting expertise to support client reporting and share client insights. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my customer segmentation and analytical skills. I created statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my analytical and data interpretation skills in working on client database management and insight generation at Cartier.

I know that my data quality management capabilities and my ability to translate complex findings into clear business recommendations align with what it takes to succeed at the Client Data & Insights Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
